⋆˖⁺‧₊☽◯☾₊‧⁺˖⋆

YapYap

I'm back?? How long has it been, maybe not that long. I don't know where to start haha but I decided that maybe I'll go make some bots once in a while. Though I doubt I can make some weekly and I wish I can, I guess it wouldn't be too bad if I uploaded some everynow and then.

I guess I'll yap abit.. So currently I'm trying to quit smoking 😱 I've been smoking cigarettes since I was literally 11 years old, so this one's gonna be rough I think. I've quit one time for 2-3 years and it was surprisingly not that bad but have relapsed. I guess relapsing is the hardest thing about it lol. Worst part is I absolutely love smoking, the taste and the smell (weird), and just the smoke in general. Almost passionate about it lol. So why did I suddenly decide to quit? Really lame reason though. Because I want to save up for a new phone 😭 cigarettes are so fucking expensive nowadays it's ridiculous. And though I tried to transition to vaping, there's just something else about cigarettes that I love. Maybe it's the ritual of lighting it up. But whatever it is, it's gonna make this quitting shit harder haha.

I'm not giving up drinking though, hell fuck no 😹

I'm also really pissed because I just lost some of my notes which has dozens of bot ideas, and this one I just had to try my best to remember some details. I also apologise in advance if this type of bot/type of way I make my bots/prompts are outdated as I'm not really active anymore in social media let alone reddit.

Anyways, I hope you enjoy.

:)
